variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12156 Air Filter
variants.description: The HiFi Filter SA 12156 air filter is designed to provide superior filtration and enhance the performance of your machinery. Constructed with premium materials, this air filter effectively captures dust, dirt, and other airborne contaminants, ensuring that your engine remains clean and operates efficiently. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12156 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining optimal engine health and performance. By ordering with FilterFinder you benefit from our 1-year manufacturer warranty, as well as no quibble 45-day returns and a full inspection of the parts by our engineers, making sure you get both peace of mind and exceptional value for your investment.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26348 Air Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12156
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26348 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
